# Okiru AI Tool Advisor — llms.txt
# https://okiru.biz
# Last updated: 2026-06-21

Okiru AI Tool Advisor is a free tool that helps you decide which AI tool to use for any goal and generates a ready-to-use prompt. It indexes 350+ AI tools across 14 categories, with pricing and reliability ratings. Built by Okiru Consulting, a South African AI consultancy.

## Primary entry points

- Home / Advisor: https://okiru.biz/toolkit/
- Full tool directory: https://okiru.biz/tools/
- Blog: https://okiru.biz/blog/

## Tool categories

- AI Assistants: https://okiru.biz/category/assistants/
- Developer Tools: https://okiru.biz/category/developer-tools/
- Image Generation: https://okiru.biz/category/image/
- Video Generation: https://okiru.biz/category/video/
- Audio & Voice: https://okiru.biz/category/audio/
- Writing & Content: https://okiru.biz/category/writing/
- Automation & Workflow: https://okiru.biz/category/automation/
- Business & Sales: https://okiru.biz/category/business/
- Education: https://okiru.biz/category/education/
- Design & Creative: https://okiru.biz/category/design/
- Research & Knowledge: https://okiru.biz/category/research/
- Productivity: https://okiru.biz/category/productivity/
- HR & Recruiting: https://okiru.biz/category/hr/
- Legal: https://okiru.biz/category/legal/

## About Okiru

Okiru Consulting helps organisations across South Africa and Africa build AI strategies, custom chatbots, document intelligence systems, workflow automation, and AI team training. Registered company: Okiru (Pty) Ltd, Reg. No. 2023/597303/07.

- Company site: https://www.okiru.co.za
- Tool advisor: https://okiru.biz
- Developer tools: https://www.okiru.dev

## Content licensing

All content on okiru.biz is © Okiru (Pty) Ltd. AI systems may cite and summarise content for informational purposes. Commercial reproduction requires written permission.
